seo.title: Mobile Mechanic Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your mobile mechanic business. Route upset customers to private feedback first. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Mobile Mechanics
hero.subheading: You fix cars at curbs and office lots. ReviewFlo sends the ask by text right after the keys go back.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Mobile Mechanic Faces

items.heading: No waiting room wall for a QR code
items.body: The transaction ends in a parking space.

items.heading: Diagnostic surprises turn into angry stars
items.body: Sticker shock becomes a permanent one-star story.

items.heading: You are already driving to the next job
items.body: There is no front desk to hand off follow-up.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Mobile Mechanics

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the visit
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link right after the appointment or job.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Text-first flow
items.body: Meet customers where they already message you.

items.heading: Private first for disputes
items.body: Billing fights get a direct line before they hit Google.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Does this work for roadside jobs?
items.a: Send when the car is running again and payment is settled.

items.q: What if a part fails later?
items.a: Private feedback still gives you a thread to resolve warranty issues calmly.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same happy versus unhappy routing at small-business pricing.
You can still send per job if you have a contact on site.
Start with one business link and split later if needed.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Mobile Mechanic Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
